nodes.label: EDITMODE tweak host postMessage protocol
nodes.rationale: useTweaks/TweaksPanel implement a host edit-mode protocol over postMessage: panel posts __edit_mode_available, listens for __activate/__deactivate_edit_mode, and persists edits via __edit_mode_set_keys (host rewrites the /*EDITMODE-BEGIN*/ JSON block on disk). TWEAK_DEFAULTS is the single source of truth consumed by scene-app's App.
